view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for `dry_run` support on mutating actions is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for `dry_run` support on mutating actions is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for `dry_run` support on mutating actions as evidenced by the linked use case, which describes a scenario where an agent runs a dry-run to preview the consequences of rescheduling appointments. The response from this dry-run includes details about bookings that would move cleanly, conflicts, and approvals required, demonstrating that the system correctly handles the dry-run functionality. This aligns directly with the requirement stated in the exploratory step.
